Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class FunctionalOperationContractImpl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.FunctionalOperationContractImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Contract, FunctionalOperationContract, OperationContract, SpecificationElement
public class FunctionalOperationContractImpl extends Object implements FunctionalOperationContract
Standard implementation of the OperationContract interface.

    getTypeName()
    Returns technical name for the contract type.
    VisibilityModifier
    getVisibility()
    Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
    boolean
    hasFreeModifiable(LocationVariable heap)
    Returns true iff the method (according to a free clause of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is freely "strictly pure."
    boolean
    hasMby()
    Tells whether the contract contains a measured_by clause.
    boolean
    hasModifiable(LocationVariable heap)
    Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
    boolean
    hasResultVar()
     
    boolean
    hasSelfVar()
    Checks if a self variable is originally provided.
    int

    Returns the id number of the contract.

    Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
    String
    proofToString(Services services)
    Returns a parseable String representation of the contract.
    FunctionalOperationContract
    setID(int newId)
    Returns a contract which is identical this contract except that the id is set to the new id.
    Contract
    setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT, IObserverFunction newPM)
    Returns a contract which is identical to this contract except that the KeYJavaType and IObserverFunction are set to the new values.
    boolean
    toBeSaved()
    Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too.

  • Method Details

    • map

      public FunctionalOperationContract map(UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface Contract
      Specified by:
      map in interface FunctionalOperationContract
      Specified by:
      map in interface OperationContract
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.

    • getReplaceMap

      protected Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> getReplaceMap(LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, LocationVariable resultVar, LocationVariable excVar, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars, Services services)
      Get the according replace map for the given variables.
      Parameters:
      selfVar - the self variable
      paramVars - the parameter variables
      resultVar - the result variable
      excVar - the exception variable
      atPreVars - a map of pre-heaps to their variables
      services - the services object
      Returns:
      the replacement map

    • getReplaceMap

      @Deprecated protected Map<Term,Term> getReplaceMap(LocationVariable heap, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, Services services)
      Deprecated.

    • getReplaceMap

      @Deprecated protected Map<Term,Term> getReplaceMap(LocationVariable heap, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, Term resultTerm, Term excTerm, Term atPre, Services services)

    • getReplaceMap

      protected Map<Term,Term> getReplaceMap(Map<LocationVariable,Term> heapTerms, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, Term resultTerm, Term excTerm, Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, Services services)
      Get the according replace map for the given variable terms.
      Parameters:
      heapTerms - the heap terms
      selfTerm - the self term
      paramTerms - the parameter terms
      resultTerm - the result term
      excTerm - the exception variable term
      atPres - a map of pre-heaps to their variable terms
      services - the services object
      Returns:
      the replacement map

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface SpecificationElement

    • id

      public int id()
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns the id number of the contract. If a contract has instances for several methods (inheritance!), all instances have the same id. The id is either non-negative or equal to INVALID_ID.
      Specified by:
      id in interface Contract

      public KeYJavaType getKJT()
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Returns the KeYJavaType representing the class/interface to which the specification element belongs.

    • toBeSaved

      public boolean toBeSaved()
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too. (this is currently true for contracts specified directly in DL, but not for JML contracts)
      Specified by:
      toBeSaved in interface Contract
      Returns:
      see above

    • proofToString

      public String proofToString(Services services)
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns a parseable String representation of the contract. Precondition: toBeSaved() must be true.
      Specified by:
      proofToString in interface Contract
      Parameters:
      services - the services instance
      Returns:
      the (parseable) String representation

      public Term getPost(LocationVariable heap, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, LocationVariable resultVar, LocationVariable excVar, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars, Services services)

      Returns the postcondition of the contract.
      Specified by:
      getPost in interface FunctionalOperationContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap variable.
      selfVar - the self variable.
      paramVars - the list of parameter variables.
      resultVar - the result variable.
      excVar - the exception variable.
      atPreVars - the map of old variables.
      services - the services object.
      Returns:
      the post condition.

    • hasModifiable

      public boolean hasModifiable(LocationVariable heap)
      Description copied from interface: OperationContract
      Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
      Specified by:
      hasModifiable in interface OperationContract
      Returns:
      whether this contract is strictly pure.

      public boolean hasFreeModifiable(LocationVariable heap)
      Description copied from interface: OperationContract
      Returns true iff the method (according to a free clause of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is freely "strictly pure."
      Specified by:
      hasFreeModifiable in interface OperationContract
      Returns:
      whether this contract is freely strictly pure.

    • getModifiable

      public Term getModifiable(LocationVariable heap, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: OperationContract
      Returns the modifiable clause of the contract.
      Specified by:
      getModifiable in interface OperationContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap variable
      heapTerm - the heap variable term.
      selfTerm - the self variable term.
      paramTerms - the list of parameter variable terms.
      services - the services object.
      Returns:
      the modifiable clause.

      Returns the free modifiable clause of the contract.
      Specified by:
      getFreeModifiable in interface OperationContract

    • getDep

      public Term getDep(LocationVariable heap, boolean atPre, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns the dependency set of the contract.
      Specified by:
      getDep in interface Contract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap variable
      atPre - boolean whether old heap should be used
      selfVar - self variable
      paramVars - parameter variables
      atPreVars - variables at previous heap
      services - services object
      Returns:
      the dependency set

    • getDep

      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns the dependency set of the contract.
      Specified by:
      getDep in interface Contract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap variable
      atPre - boolean whether old heap should be used
      heapTerm - the heap variable term
      selfTerm - term of self variable
      paramTerms - terms of parameter variables
      atPres - terms of variables at previous heap

      the dependency set

      Returns:

      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns a contract which is identical to this contract except that the KeYJavaType and IObserverFunction are set to the new values.
      Specified by:
      setTarget in interface Contract
      Parameters:
      newKJT - the new KeYJavaType
      newPM - the new observer function
